violations.text: Allergen statement is lacking on menu. Establishment is to add the allergy statement to menu. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Small leak was observed in the walk-in cooler. Food is protected by plastic curtains, and no wastewater observed in contact with food. Establishment is to completely fix leak. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
Allergen statement is lacking on menu. Establishment is to add the allergy statement to menu. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Food was observed in contact with condensate leaking from the walk-in cooler. Food that was in contact with water was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Plastic curtains were placed over walk-in shelves to protect food until service arrives. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

Various foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
Food was observed uncovered in walk-in cooler and chest freezer. Food must be covered to prevent contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
The prep unit gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

The walk-in cooler was observed iced over and leaking from the condenser fan. Establishment is to have walk-in cooler serviced. Service was called at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025
Multiple floor tiles in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The bathroom does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Establishment must install hand sink in the bathroom. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

The hand-sink in the kitchen was observed leaking from the bottom pipe. Establishment is to fix leak. An accumulation of ice build-up was observed in the walk-in cooler. Establishment is to remove ice build-up. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
Multiple floor tiles in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
